Bio:
Ty Wilson is the Owner and Attorney at Ty Wilson Law, a law practice dedicated to helping individuals who have been harmed as a result of negligence. With over 20 years of legal experience, he focuses primarily on personal injury and workers' compensation cases across Georgia, including the Atlanta metro area and coastal regions. He earned his Juris Doctor degree from John Marshall Law School in 2000 and his B.B.A. in Finance from Sam Houston State University in 1993. Before founding his own practice in 2004, Ty worked as a staff attorney at King & Spalding, a prominent defense firm in downtown Atlanta, from 1998 to 2002.

Ty Wilson Law, located in Atlanta, Georgia, is built on a foundation of client education and personalized legal guidance. Ty's approach emphasizes ensuring clients understand their available resources and legal options before making important decisions. His practice handles a wide range of personal injury matters, including auto accidents, wrongful death, premises liability, and brain injuries, as well as workers' compensation claims. An active member of the State Bar of Georgia and the Georgia Trial Lawyers Association, Ty has been recognized as a Top Lawyer by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution and Atlanta Magazine, and holds an AV Preeminent 5.0/5 Peer Review Rating from Martindale-Hubbell.

Company Description:
Ty Wilson Law is a law practice dedicated to helping those who have been harmed as a result of the negligence of others. We understand that the legal issues and pressures that you are experiencing are what matter to you most. As an attorney, Ty Wilson focuses on making sure that you understand what resources are available to you, and how best to use those resources to take the right course of action. In actuality, you may not even need an attorney, but before you decide, make sure that you’re informed.

At Ty Wilson Law, our goal is to make sure that you are confidently seeking the right attorney for your unique situation. Since there are so many areas of law, it’s important to hire an attorney who routinely practices in the area of law that best suits your needs. Remember, the most important thing is resolving the issues and answering the questions that matter to you most. Let Ty be your voice, and rest assured, knowing that he will do what it takes to make sure you receive the right compensation for your needs.

Be informed. Be aware. Be prepared.

Bio:
Michael E. Gumprecht is the Trial Lawyer and Owner of The Gumprecht Law Firm in Kennesaw, Georgia. As the founding attorney, he established the firm in 2014 and focuses exclusively on personal injury plaintiff work, representing victims of negligence in car accidents, truck accidents, premises liability, brain injuries, and wrongful death cases throughout Northern Georgia and across the state. Licensed to practice in Georgia since 2011, Mr. Gumprecht is admitted to practice in Georgia state courts, the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia, the Georgia Court of Appeals, and the Georgia Supreme Court.

Before founding his firm, Mr. Gumprecht worked at a small general practice firm outside Atlanta before narrowing his focus to personal injury law. He also brings a unique technology background to his practice, having previously worked as a computer programmer and data center engineer for LexisNexis, which gives him an edge in handling digital evidence, accident simulations, and metadata analysis. A graduate of Liberty University School of Law in Virginia, Mr. Gumprecht has achieved notable recognition including being named to Super Lawyers and Rising Stars, and is a Lifetime Member of the Million Dollar Advocates Forum and Multi-Million Dollar Advocates Forum, placing him among the top 0.04% of Georgia attorneys. His firm operates multiple locations across North Georgia with primary offices in Kennesaw and Atlanta, offering 24/7 availability to accident victims.

Bio:
Kevin P. Race is the Trial Attorney and Founder of Race Law LLC, a personal injury law firm based in Atlanta, Georgia, specializing in medical malpractice, serious injury, and wrongful death claims. He earned his Juris Doctor, cum laude, from Georgia State University College of Law in 1989 and holds a degree from the University of Georgia. Admitted to practice in Georgia state courts, the Georgia Court of Appeals, the Supreme Court of Georgia, and federal courts including the U.S. District Court for the Northern and Middle Districts of Georgia, Kevin brings over three decades of legal experience to his practice.

Before founding Race Law LLC, Kevin spent more than 20 years as a defense attorney representing doctors and hospitals in medical malpractice cases at Sullivan, Hall, Booth & Smith, and previously served as founding partner of Insley & Race, LLC. This extensive background defending healthcare providers has given him unique insight into medical operations, complex medical issues, and patient safety concerns, which he now leverages to advocate for injured clients. Kevin is a member of the American Board of Trial Advocates and has been recognized as a Top Rated Lawyer by Martindale-Hubbell and among the Top Lawyers of Georgia.

Title: CEO
Company Location: 675 Mansell Road, Roswell, GA 30076, United States
Company Description:
Company Overview
MediStreams is a healthcare payments and remittance automation processor that streamlines inefficient processes to reduce the time and cost of getting paid. We provide outsourced Healthcare Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) services for healthcare providers such as health systems, hospitals, clinics, physician groups, labs, and clinics.  Despite significant advances in technology, RCM in the United States is unique and extremely complex.  
Although there has been a push for insurance payments to be made electronically, there are still many that arrive in the form of paper Explanation of Benefits (EOBs) combined with a traditional paper check. The Electronic Remittance Advice (ERAs) do arrive electronically and the funds are deposited to the provider’s bank, but they still must be managed and combined with other payment types to create a file that can be posted into the providers practice management software.   MediStreams is now helping the industry embrace new payment technologies that leverage existing credit pipes while managing protected healthcare information.
MediStreams’ process automates the flow of healthcare payments by creating electronic files customized specifically to post directly to the provider’s practice management system. MediStreams’ unique service delivery model accelerates the posting of remittances while eliminating errors associated with manual processing which significantly reduces provider overhead costs.  MediStreams’ fully HIPAA compliant platform also provides the means for payers to provide a fully reconciled payment to providers in compliance with Section 1104 of the Affordable Care Act (ACA).

Title: Office Manager
Company Location: 4555 Mansell Road, Alpharetta, GA 30022, United States
Company Description:
SILK v5.3 is a fully certified CCHIT 2011 Ambulatory EHR and certified 2011/2012 ONC-ATCB Complete EHR. 

SILK is a 100% J2EE web-based system with a unique set of healthcare development tools, deployed against world-class Oracle database technology. These tools include electronic medical records (EMR) workflows, practice management workflows, HIE, forms development/publishing, report generators, communication tools, claims scrubbing, revenue cycle management, interoperability interface tools, and other rapid application development tools that enable SILK to have a unique software offering in one application and one unified database. 

SILK is also not bound to native platforms but has the ability to run on any web enabled mobile device regardless of operating systems or size of the device. iPhone, iIPads, Droids and tablet PCs all run the application from anywhere in the world. 

For the practice, SILK conforms to the specialty, to the office, down to the specific workflow of each contributor of the office in a user friendly format without the need for massive development or customizations of the application. SILK’s open reporting tools allows for data access at the patient, clinical, financial and all other levels of the healthcare lifecycle. SILK is the next level in healthcare technology providing more than just an application. SILK provides the tools to enable your application to grow with your practice as well as the changes in healthcare without the debilitating cost.

Title: Operations Manager
Company Location: 675 Mansell Road, Roswell, GA 30076, United States
Company Description:
Company Overview
MediStreams is a healthcare payments and remittance automation processor that streamlines inefficient processes to reduce the time and cost of getting paid. We provide outsourced Healthcare Revenue Cycle Management (RCM) services for healthcare providers such as health systems, hospitals, clinics, physician groups, labs, and clinics.  Despite significant advances in technology, RCM in the United States is unique and extremely complex.  
Although there has been a push for insurance payments to be made electronically, there are still many that arrive in the form of paper Explanation of Benefits (EOBs) combined with a traditional paper check. The Electronic Remittance Advice (ERAs) do arrive electronically and the funds are deposited to the provider’s bank, but they still must be managed and combined with other payment types to create a file that can be posted into the providers practice management software.   MediStreams is now helping the industry embrace new payment technologies that leverage existing credit pipes while managing protected healthcare information.
MediStreams’ process automates the flow of healthcare payments by creating electronic files customized specifically to post directly to the provider’s practice management system. MediStreams’ unique service delivery model accelerates the posting of remittances while eliminating errors associated with manual processing which significantly reduces provider overhead costs.  MediStreams’ fully HIPAA compliant platform also provides the means for payers to provide a fully reconciled payment to providers in compliance with Section 1104 of the Affordable Care Act (ACA).

Title: Co-founder
Company Location: 1776 Peachtree Street Ste 423, South Atlanta, GA 30309, United States
Company Description:
We monitor every insurance payer's policies and bulletins for important changes that affect providers, hospitals, and billing companies. Because most policies are long and difficult to decipher, we send specialty-specific policy change notifications (with plain-English digests) directly to the people in your organization who need them. 

Many payers send exhaustively lengthy documents, covering every specialty to every director and specialist in provider organizations; this creates a high noise-to-signal ratio and effectively makes policy updates useless. If you employ our software for policy monitoring, no longer will your biller-coders, directors, and specialists receive erroneous notifications about policies that don't affect them, and the changes that are important to them will become immediately actionable and trackable. 

Our approach combines intricate algorithmic monitoring and detection with real human analysis–our specialty-specific expert biller-coders. This makes our tools very difficult to fool or replicate, and keeps us highly aligned with your revenue cycle management needs.

We hope you'll allow CompliancePT to welcome you to the best in class solution for keeping up with payer policy changes. To discuss our service and your needs, reach out to us at info@compliancept.com

– The Crew at CompliancePT

Title: Chief Executive Officer

Title: Director of Orthopedics
Company Location: 1230 Baxter Street, Athens, GA 30606, United States
Company Description:
Founded in 1906 by two local physicians,  St. Mary’s became a Catholic hospital in 1938 operated by the Missionary Sisters of the Most Sacred Heart of Jesus and later sponsored by the Sisters of Mercy. Today, St. Mary’s Health Care System is a regional not-for-profit Catholic teaching healthcare system inclusive of three hospitals, St. Mary’s Medical Group, Graduate Medical Education, Home Health, Hospice Services, Senior Living, extensive outpatient services, auxiliary/volunteer services and clinical affiliations with the University of Georgia/Augusta University.
A member of Trinity Health, the third largest non-for-profit health system in the U.S., our Mission is to serve in the spirit of the Gospel as a compassionate and transforming healing presence within our communities while our Vision is to become the national leader in improving the health of our communities and each person we serve, to be the most trusted health partner for life.
St. Mary’s facilities include St. Mary’s Hospital (Athens), St. Mary’s Good Samaritan Hospital (Greensboro), St. Mary’s Sacred Heart Hospital (Lavonia), Georgia Neurological Surgery & Comprehensive Spine, Highland Hills Village, St. Mary’s Mercy Guest Cottage, St. Mary’s Outpatient & Wellness Center and St. Mary’s Infusion and Wound Care Center.
St. Mary’s has maintained continuous accreditation by The Joint Commission since 1954; an Advanced Primary Stroke Center since 2004, Spine Surgery certification since 2011 and Thrombectomy Capable Stroke Center since 2022.  St. Mary’s Hospital, St. Mary’s Sacred Heart Hospital and St. Mary's Good Samaritan Hospital received the American Heart Association’s 2024 GWTG® - Stroke Gold Plus recognition, St. Mary’s Hospital is accredited as a Chest Pain Center by the American College of Cardiology, St. Mary's Athens was named Georgia’s Large Hospital of the Year (2018) and St. Mary’s Good Samaritan was one of only nine hospitals in Georgia to receive the CMS 5-Star designation in 2023.

Title: CEO
Company Description:
Meddbill is more than a billing company. We manage every physician’s A/R dollar from beginning to end. We feel that is the most effective means to increase cash flow and reduce A/R. We tailor our A/R management program to ensure adherence to the physician’s collection philosophy. We at Meddbill feel the optimal A/R management strategy is to keep the three components (billing, after insurance, and bad debt collections) together, however if desired, we can manage any segment independently.

Our operating methodology allows us to easily retrieve demographic and financial data from any Practice Management Software and process it through our billing system. Meddbill also recognizes some physicians may need to enhance their office management systems. Therefore we also can provide the latest in Practice Management and Electronic Medical Record Software. 

Most physicians are leaving money on the table because they do not have the time, knowledge, or staff to manage their accounts receivable properly. Today the only way to get current and stay current with all the myriad of rules and regulations from CMS and commercial payers is to specialize in medical reimbursement and align with the strongest ARM system available. Meddbill is ever diligent in keeping its staff current with the latest reimbursement rules. At Meddbill we employee only dedicated and motivated account managers with years of medical billing experience.

Title: Surgical Neurophysiologist
Company Location: Po Box 2586, Mckinney, TX 75070, United States
Company Description:
We provide the highest quality neuromonitoring available.
Whether you are a IONM technologist, a physician looking for a better solution, or a hospital seeking a reliable source of neuro-monitoring, we can provide a high-quality, efficient service for patients. We are focused on a value-based service delivery that maximizes efficiency, safety and professionalism.
OverWatch is a medical service company dedicated to providing Intraoperative Neurophysiological Monitoring, or IONM, during surgery or other procedures. Our comprehensive team includes board-certified CNIM technologist working with a team of remote specialist neurologists in concert with your surgeon and physician to identify and avoid potential injury or damage to the integrity of brain, spine, and peripheral nerve function during complex surgical procedures. IONM can also help to reduce the risk of post-operative deficits as well as aiding in the anatomical localization during surgery. It can also reduce operative time and increase efficiency.
Working together, our team can provide patients with the reassurance that the highest quality of care was provided during surgery, and allow surgeons to have the confidence and reassurance that their care has been optimized.  Through our mission of safe, ethical, efficient and cost-effective healthcare, we at OverWatch ensure each of our patients has the highest quality of care possible. 
Our Mission
To maximize the patient experience by providing services that can help maximize surgeon efficiency and patient safety. Mutual respect for our team members, synergy in the operating room and hospital, and a value-based model of high quality care is what defines Synaptixs.

Title: plastic surgeon
Company Location: 1100 Johnson Ferry Road Northeast, Atlanta, GA 30342, United States
Company Description:
Dr. Sybile Val is a fully trained plastic and reconstructive surgeon dedicated to providing her patients with compassionate care in a private, warm and safe environment.
Dr. Val earned her bachelors degree in Biology from Adelphi University in Garden City, NY. It was there that she discovered her passion for helping and teaching others. As a chemistry teaching assistant, she began honing her teaching skills. Upon completion of her bachelor's degree, she attended medical school at Wright State University in Dayton, Ohio. As a full-time medical student, she also served as a substitute teacher for the Dayton Public School System, as well as a student tutor for junior medical school students.
Subsequent to medical school, she completed a vigorous general surgery residency program at SUNY Downstate in Brooklyn, NY.  She then ventured south, completing a three-year plastic and reconstructive surgery training program at LSU in New Orleans.
While at LSU, she underwent intense micro-surgical training in both trauma and breast reconstruction at numerous hospitals, including University Hospital (formerly known as Charity Hospital). She worked with pioneers in New Orleans who helped develop the DIEP flap for breast reconstruction.
Her interest in breast reconstruction led to numerous presentations at national and international meetings, as well as performance of more than 200 micro-vascular breast and trauma reconstructions. She was able to do all this while honing her aesthetic skills. Her interest in cosmetic surgery – and fat grafting in particular – led to her participate in research projects on fat grafting as well as presentations on the topic at national meetings.
As a surgeon, Dr. Val appreciates and understands the need for non-surgical options. Thus, she also enjoys helping her patients reach their goals non-surgically, if possible. She enjoys procedures such as soft tissue fillers and neurotoxins, and she takes every opportunity to teach patients about quality skin care. She believes in providing all of her patients with a detailed and thorough evaluation, where questions are not only encouraged, but expected. She’s been known to quiz patients at the end of a consultation to ensure they fully understand their condition and surgical options.

Polaris Spine & Neurosurgery delivers premium care with a personal touch across the full spectrum of brain and spine care needs. Surgery is always the last option we consider.

Your brand. Fulfilled.

Title: Partner
Company Location: 1075 Peachtree Street Northeast, Atlanta, GA 30309, United States
Company Description:
The attorneys at Fisher Phillips are committed to providing value to our clients. We do one thing - represent employers in labor and employment matters.
Our clients know their legal problems will be treated as business problems and that we strive to help them avoid legal problems. We believe the lawsuit that’s never filed is a better win for a client than a costly defense verdict. 
Although skilled and tenacious advocates, our attorneys recognize that the most aggressive and expensive approach may not always be the best solution to a client's problem. We seek to identify the client's primary business objective, design a solution to fit the objective, and implement that solution in the most efficient manner possible. 
By performing compliance audits, providing the right policies, procedures and training, and offering thoughtful advice and counsel, we assist clients in preventing employee claims and lawsuits, government investigations, and union organizing activity.
We’re in the client service business and know that many labor and employment problems arise without much  warning and require an immediate response. We meet deadlines and provide plenty of advance time where client review of documents is needed. And we communicate with our clients in plain English. 
Founded in Atlanta, we're national with 37 offices and more than 500 attorneys. Our attorneys practice before state and federal courts and administrative agencies in virtually every state.

Freeman Mathis & Gary, LLP is a nationally recognized AMLaw 200 law firm with over 400 attorneys servicing clients in 37 offices and 21 states. From our modest beginnings in 1997, when six partners launched what would become today’s FMG, we’ve grown into one of the premier litigation firms recognized by U.S. News as one of the "Best Law Firms in America." 
We understand that legal matters are often defined by critical moments. Whether you're facing significant litigation, navigating a business transaction, or seeking legal protection for your business, our experienced team is committed to delivering exceptional legal representation precisely when it counts the most. With a focus on integrity, capability, and unwavering dedication, we stand by your side every step of the way, ensuring that your legal challenges are met with the skill and attention they deserve. Trust us to be your partners for when it counts – because your success is our priority.
